gist.headline: Director's cut, automated
gist.blurb: HyperRush AI just dropped into the chat. Hand it your scripts and audio, and it'll spit out fully edited, captioned short-form videos while you sip your coffee.
gist.summary: Added HyperRush AI to the community showcase, introducing automated video editing, captioning, and formatting for short-form content.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover and use HyperRush AI to turn raw scripts and media into polished social clips without manual editing.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about an app that automates video editing and short-form clips. Visual symbols include film reels, clapperboards, and video timelines. Polly the bee can act as a film director, while the Robot monitor displays the video editing process.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny director's beret, holding a pixelated clapperboard next to a chunky retro monitor robot displaying a video editing timeline. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
